title: commelina aspera var. aspera
intro: Commelina aspera var. aspera, also known as rough Commelina or asperin, is a species of flowering plant in the dayflower family, Commelinaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Commelina aspera var. aspera include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health concerns.
